Prepare IMPACT annotations

Source: R/IMPACT_postprocess.R
IMPACT_postprocess_annotations.Rd

Transform IMPACT annotations from wide format (one row per SNP) to long format (multiple rows per SNP). Adds a topConsensus column, sorts loci by mean IMPACT of the top consensus SNP, and creates a combined Cell_Type label.

IMPACT_postprocess_annotations(
  ANNOT_MELT,
  order_loci = TRUE,
  no_no_loci = NULL
)

Arguments

ANNOT_MELT

A melted data.table of IMPACT annotations (as returned by IMPACT_get_annotations or IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations).

order_loci

Whether to reorder loci by mean IMPACT score of the top consensus SNP.

no_no_loci

Character vector of locus names to exclude.

Value

A data.table with postprocessed IMPACT annotations including a uniqueID column.

See also

Other IMPACT: IMPACT_compute_enrichment(), IMPACT_files, IMPACT_get_annotation_key(), IMPACT_get_annotations(), IMPACT_get_ldscores(), IMPACT_get_top_annotations(), IMPACT_heatmap(), IMPACT_iterate_enrichment(), IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations(), IMPACT_plot_enrichment(), IMPACT_plot_impact_score(), IMPACT_process(), IMPACT_query(), IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot(), hierarchical_colors(), prepare_mat_meta()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
ANNOT_MELT <- IMPACT_postprocess_annotations(ANNOT_MELT)
} # }

Contents
